title: tabernaemontana venusta
intro: Tabernaemontana venusta, also known as the Yellow Mandevilla, is a flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana venusta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, while also possessing potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
